name: ISO Care Unlimited
coverageRules: ["Pre-certification is required for certain services.","No benefits will be paid for expenses determined not to be medically necessary.","Benefits will be paid for services and supplies that are medically necessary."]
exclusions: ["Expenses incurred in home country are not covered.","No benefits will be paid for services designated as 'No Benefits'.","Permanent residents of the U.S. are not eligible for coverage."]
priorAuthRequired: ["All Inpatient Hospitalization","High Risk Maternity","Certain Outpatient Surgical procedures"]
